items.title: Los Angeles Clippers salary cap situation with Brook Lopez opted in, everybody else opted out.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Los Angeles Clippers salary cap situation with Brook Lopez opted in, everybody else opted out.

They reduce their payroll significantly but project with roughly just $21 million in cap space.

They could create more if they save a bunch of money in a Kawhi Leonard trade.

items.title: Clippers Reportedly Make Decision on Brook Lopez's $9.2M Contract Option Ahead of NBA Free Agency
items.author: Bleacher Report
items.body_excerpt: Clippers Reportedly Make Decision on Brook Lopez's $9.2M Contract Option Ahead of NBA Free Agency Bleacher Report

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers will exercise the $9.19 million team option for the 2026-27 season on Brook Lopez and will decline team options on Bogdan Bogdanovic ($16 million) and Nicolas Batum ($5.88 million), making Bogdanovic and Batum unrestricted free agents, sources confirm.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers will exercise the $9.19 million team option for the 2026-27 season on Brook Lopez and will decline team options on Bogdan Bogdanovic ($16 million) and Nicolas Batum ($5.88 million), making Bogdanovic and Batum unrestricted free agents, sources confirm.

items.title: I'm told that the LA Clippers will exercise starting center Brook Lopez team option
items.author: Law Murray 📘

I'm told that the LA Clippers will exercise starting center Brook Lopez team option

And declining the team options on Bogdan Bogdanovic and Nicolas Batum
